allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove duplicate Service model in favor of JobService

- Deleted Service.swift \(old minimal UI model\)
- All views have been using JobService \(proper data model with Firestore integration\)
- Verified no remaining references to old Service or ApplicationStatus enum
- Eliminates conceptual duplication: JobService now serves as the single source of truth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Implement NavigationCoordinator architecture to fix role switching black screen

Added NavigationCoordinator pattern with hierarchical coordinators:
- AppCoordinator: Manages app-level navigation and role switching
- JobSeekerCoordinator: Handles Job Seeker tabs and navigation stacks
- ServiceProviderCoordinator: Handles Service Provider tabs and navigation stacks
- NavigationDestinations: Type-safe enums for destinations and tabs

Key fixes:
- Fixed stale user snapshot bug in MainView \(now reads live user from authManager\)
- Fixed ProgressView stuck issue with improved initialization timing
- Changed MainView.onAppear to .task for earlier coordinator setup
- Added coordinator readiness check before rendering child views
- Simplified NeedJobView/NeedWork to directly use coordinator from environment

When user switches roles, AppCoordinator destroys old coordinator and creates new one,
ensuring fresh view hierarchy with correct role and no black screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
